scripture.verse: as for me and my household, we will serve the LORD
scripture.reason: Praying for family is entrusting the home itself to God.
scripture.posture: Slow down and name each person as you hand them over to God.
scripture.key_word_hint: me and my household — a family-wide covenant with the Lord.

bible_story.title: Joshua's Family Covenant
bible_story.summary: Joshua stood before Israel and declared, 'As for me and my household, we will serve the LORD.' The family is the first community formed before God.

testimony: God has received this prayer for the family. A fuller meditation will arrive once the AI analysis completes.

gratitude: The family we share life with
